componentDescription: Dialogs are overlaid modal paper based components with a backdrop.

aria-describedby.description: The id(s) of the element(s) that describe the dialog.

aria-labelledby.description: The id(s) of the element(s) that label the dialog.

aria-modal.description: Informs assistive technologies that the element is modal. It's added on the element with role="dialog".

children.description: Dialog children, usually the included sub-components.

classes.description: Override or extend the styles applied to the component.

fullWidth.description:
If true, the dialog stretches to maxWidth.
Notice that the dialog width grow is limited by the default margin.

maxWidth.description: Determine the max-width of the dialog. The dialog width grows with the size of the screen. Set to false to disable maxWidth.

onClose.description: Callback fired when the component requests to be closed.

event.name: event
event.description: The event source of the callback.

PaperComponent.description: The component used to render the body of the dialog.

role.description: The ARIA role for the dialog element. The main dialog role is dialog, but alertdialog can be used if the content of the dialog requires immediate attention. See https://www.w3.org/TR/wai-aria-1.2/#dialog and https://www.w3.org/TR/wai-aria-1.2/#alertdialog for more details.

scroll.description: Determine the container for scrolling the dialog.

slotProps.description: The props used for each slot inside.

slots.description: The components used for each slot inside.

sx.description: The system prop that allows defining system overrides as well as additional CSS styles.

transitionDuration.description: The duration for the transition, in milliseconds. You may specify a single timeout for all transitions, or individually with an object.

slotDescriptions.backdrop: The component that renders the backdrop.
slotDescriptions.container: The component that renders the container.
slotDescriptions.paper: The component that renders the paper.
slotDescriptions.root: The component that renders the root.
slotDescriptions.transition: The component that renders the transition. Follow this guide to learn more about the requirements for this component.
